steps.title: Find the speeds of objects R and S
steps.content:
Object R travels 4x inches in y seconds, giving speed $$\frac{4x}{y}$$ inches per second.
Object S travels at 2× the speed of R, so its speed is $$2 \cdot \frac{4x}{y} = \frac{8x}{y}$$ inches per second.

steps.title: Calculate the time for object S to travel 24x inches
steps.content:
For distance 24x and speed $$\frac{8x}{y}$$:
$$\text{time} = \frac{24x}{\frac{8x}{y}} = 24x \cdot \frac{y}{8x} = 3y$$ seconds.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
